topic.title: SAP TM Mock Viva Round (Certification & Accenture Style)

learningObjectives.title: Understand mock viva progression
learningObjectives.description: Practice moving from basic concepts to consultant-level scenario explanations.

learningObjectives.title: Understand consultant-quality answering
learningObjectives.description: Deliver structured answers linking business need, process logic, and SAP TM capabilities.

learningObjectives.title: Understand interview readiness expectations
learningObjectives.description: Build confidence for certification and enterprise interview styles with timed responses.

sections.title: SAP TM Mock Viva Round (Certification & Accenture Style)

sections.content: This mock viva simulates the style of questions commonly asked during SAP TM stream assessments, certification interviews and Accenture technical viva rounds. Questions progress from basic concepts to consultant-level business scenarios.

sections.title: Mock Viva Rule
sections.content: Answer every question confidently within 60–90 seconds. Begin with the business purpose before explaining SAP TM functionality.

sections.title: Fundamental Questions
rows: Why do companies implement SAP TM?
Cost optimization, visibility and efficient logistics.

sections.title: Functional Understanding
rows: Rules, cost, service level and capacity.
Difference between Freight Unit and Freight Order?
How does SAP TM integrate with SAP EWM?

sections.title: Business Scenarios
rows: Split Freight Units or optimize planning.

sections.content: Question: Explain the complete transportation lifecycle in SAP TM from customer order to carrier payment. A consultant-level answer should cover Sales Order, Delivery, Freight Unit, Planning, Transportation Proposal, Carrier Selection, Freight Order, Execution, Event Management, Charge Calculation, Freight Settlement and Reporting.

sections.title: Best Practice
sections.content: Maintain eye contact, structure every answer logically and always relate SAP TM functionality to a real business outcome such as reduced transportation cost or improved delivery performance.

sections.title: Model Consultant Answer
sections.content: Question: Why is SAP TM better than manual transportation planning? Answer: SAP TM automates transportation planning, optimizes routes and carrier selection, reduces logistics costs, improves resource utilization, provides real-time shipment visibility and integrates seamlessly with SAP S/4HANA, EWM and Business Network.

sections.title: Accenture Viva Tip
sections.content: Accenture interviewers often ask 'Why' before 'How'. Explain the business need first, then describe how SAP TM solves it.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: Speaking only about SAP transactions without explaining the business objective gives the impression of memorization rather than understanding.

items: Explain business purpose before technical details.
Know the complete SAP TM lifecycle.
Revise integrations, planning, execution and settlement.
Be prepared for follow-up scenario questions.
